TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kaluluwan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Fungpinsyang ka alang Kaluluwan. 125 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 305 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 249 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 56 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis55%, sakizaya 9%, Kebalan4%, Tayal2%, Bunun2%, ni rahuq na o10%.
S.PHON: = kaluluwan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən *uŋpinsjaŋ ka alaŋ kaluluwan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, saki*aja *%, kəbalan*%, tajal*%, bunun*%, ni ɾaħuq na o**%.
S.FORM: = Kaluluwan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Fungpinsyang ka alang Kaluluwan. 125 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 305 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 249 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 56 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis55%, sakizaya 9%, Kebalan4%, Tayal2%, Bunun2%, ni rahuq na o10%.
S.PHON: = kaluluwan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən *uŋpinsjaŋ ka alaŋ kaluluwan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, saki*aja *%, kəbalan*%, tajal*%, bunun*%, ni ɾaħuq na o**%.
